Cash Flow Statement — Q2 2023: Operating activities generated $5.3 million in cash during the second quarter, driven by strong collections and disciplined working capital management. Investing activities consumed $2.1 million, primarily for server hardware purchases and a minority equity investment. Financing activities resulted in a net outflow of $800,000 from scheduled debt repayments. Ending cash and equivalents as of June 30 were $14.7 million, up from $12.3 million at the start of the quarter.
